Table MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS

Card of table MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS

Name

MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS

Code

MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS

'"---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

V_DCE2_CONSUMER_ADDRESS

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

 

select distinct

IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER AS IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK,

ADDRESS AS CONSUMER_ADDRESS,

CITY AS CONSUMER_CITY,

STATE AS CONSUMER_STATE,

STATE_FULL_NAME AS CONSUMER_STATE_FULL_NAME,

ZIP AS CONSUMER_ZIP_CODE,

HOME_COUNTRY_CODE AS COUNTRY_CODE,

cast(FULL_PAYLOAD_LASTUPDATEDTIMESTAMP as DATETIME) AS LAST_UPDATE_DATETIME,

CASE

WHEN TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(FULL_PAYLOAD_LASTUPDATEDTIMESTAMP) IS NOT NULL

AND COUNT(*) OVER (

PARTITION BY IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER, FULL_PAYLOAD_LASTUPDATEDTIMESTAMP

) = 1

THEN TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(FULL_PAYLOAD_LASTUPDATEDTIMESTAMP)

ELSE __load_ts

END AS VALID_FROM

from DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.V_DCE2_CONSUMER_ADDRESS

where (FULL_PAYLOAD_LASTUPDATEDTIMESTAMP <= __load_ts) OR FULL_PAYLOAD_LASTUPDATEDTIMESTAMP is NULL

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER

Primary key(s) Target: IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- PII data - The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level. --

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

Historization: SCD2 (use COALESCE(LAST_UPDATE_DATE, __load_ts) as a reference for record versioning)

 

----------

RLS

----------

RLS v2 add RDE_BRIDGE_CONSUMER_RLS to sharing script

--

Select c.*

From MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS c

join (select distinct IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK

from RDE_BRIDGE_CONSUMER_RLS

where COUNTRY_CODE_BK in (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES)

) b

On c.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK = b.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

Target schema: PL_IDENTITY

"


Check constraint name of the table MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS

CKT_MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS


Server validation rule of the table MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS

%RULES%


Code preview of the table MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS

drop table MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS
--==============================================================
create or replace table MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS (
IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK TEXT not null,
CONSUMER_ADDRESS TEXT,
CONSUMER_CITY TEXT,
CONSUMER_STATE TEXT,
CONSUMER_STATE_FULL_NAME TEXT,
CONSUMER_ZIP_CODE TEXT,
COUNTRY_CODE TEXT not null,
LAST_UPDATE_DATETIME DATETIME,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG not null,
constraint PK_MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS primary key (IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK)
not enforced
);

alter table MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS set comment = 'Table in CONSUMER DATA MODEL containing data about consumer''s address. As a part of DCE2 Project, data coming from GIGYA about consumer (identity).';

comment on column MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK is
'Unique id of the consumer/identity.';

comment on column MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS.CONSUMER_ADDRESS is
'Consumer''s residence address, street and number';

comment on column MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS.CONSUMER_CITY is
'Consumer''s residence city';

comment on column MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS.CONSUMER_STATE is
'Full name of the state or region where the consumer resides. May be null for WEB and CEF channels when home_country differs from registration_country';

comment on column MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS.CONSUMER_STATE_FULL_NAME is
'Full name of the state/province';

comment on column MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS.CONSUMER_ZIP_CODE is
'Postal code of the consumer''s place of residence';

comment on column MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS.COUNTRY_CODE is
'Two-letter ISO country code representing the consumer''s country. Can change if consumer moves to another country or shops is duty free.';

comment on column MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS.LAST_UPDATE_DATETIME is
'The date time when consumer records was last updated in the source system.';

comment on column MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is active ';

comment on column MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS.VALID_TO is
'It indicates When the record is no longer Active ';

comment on column MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS.ACTIVE_FLAG is
'It indicates if the Record is Active';

Column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS

Card of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS

Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS

VALID_FROM: SCD Type 2 start timestamp selected via cascading fallback- use FULL_PAYLOAD_LASTUPDATEDTIMESTAMP; if null/invalid or not granular enough (identical across records) fall back to technical __LOAD_TS.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS

CKC_VALID_FROM_MDE_GIGY

Format

Column VALID_TO of the table MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS

Card of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS

VALID_TO: SCD2 end timestamp. Use the same cascade as VALID_FROM (FULL_PAYLOAD_LASTUPDATEDTIMESTAMP → __LOAD_TS) to find the next change; if none exists (current row), set 9999-12-31.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS

CKC_VALID_TO_MDE_GIGY

ACTIVE_FLAG

ACTIVE_FLAG

Data Type

BOOLEAN

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER_ADDRESS

ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.
